titleStmt.title: Letter from A M Howell to The Secretary, H M Irish Office, 26 August 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: A M Howell

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Handwritten note on a printed memorandum card from A M Howell (Mrs Conrad Howell) of Crowborough, Sussex requesting information / permission for Mrs Howell's cook, Annie Moriarty to visit her home in Co. Cork.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers 1916, NAI-CSO-RP-1916-5623-15016b

correspAction.placeName: The White House, Crowborough, Sussex, England

correspAction.persName: The Secretary, H M Irish Office

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
FROM MRS CONRAD HOWELL
THE WHITE HOUSE,
CROWBOROUGH. 26. Aug 1916. TO The Secretary.
H. M. Irish Office. My cook desires permission to visit her
house in Ireland for some weeks —
returning here. I shall be much
obliged if allnecessary instructions may
be sent to me, in the event of any
restrictions & formalities being in force.
Her name & home address Annia Moriarty
Convent View
Coleraine Co Cork. Yours faithfully A. M. Howell
